title: Louse Progenitor
move_pattern: Starts with Web Cannon → Curl and Grow → Pounce → Web Cannon → (repeats).
notes: CurlUp Power (18) is applied on spawn. Web Cannon and Pounce both uncurl the monster if it is in the curled state before attacking. Curl and Grow gains block, gains 5 Strength, and sets the curled state. The loc file lists 'Acid Dust' as a move title (not matching any source move ID) — the Pounce move has no localization match.
